attributes.title: [Jira Audit] md Fallback
attributes.visState: {"title": "[Jira Audit] md Fallback", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "### \ud83d\udd75\ufe0f Category Fallback (Canary)  \n_Events no Layer 1 rule claimed, caught by the category tiers 126090 (security/identity) and 126091 (admin/config). A sustained spike of one summary here means Jira introduced an event the ruleset should classify \u2014 review and add a Layer 1 rule._"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: [Jira Audit] Rule Reference (1/2)
attributes.visState:
{"title": "[Jira Audit] Rule Reference (1/2)", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "### 🗺️ Rule & Coverage Reference
Layered ruleset — base rule 126000 guarantees **no event is missed**; the most specific rule in each family wins (file order).

| Rule | Level | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| **126000** | 3 | Base — every Jira audit event (no-miss catch-all) |
| **126010 / 126011** | 8 / 9 | Websudo (secure admin) failed / granted |
| **126012** | 5 | Single failed login |
| **126013 / 126014** | **10** | Brute force: same account / same source IP |
| **126015** | 3 | Successful login / logout |
| **126016** | **11** | MFA/2FA/SSO/SAML disabled or removed |
| **126017** | 10 | Authentication/password config changed |
| **126020 / 126021** | **12** | Admin privilege granted / added to admin group |
| **126022** | 7 | Admin privilege removed |
| **126023 / 126024** | **11** / 5 | Public/anonymous exposure enabled / removed |
| **126025** | 8 | Portal / help center / knowledge base access changed |
| **126026 / 126027** | 6 / 10 | Permission scheme reduced / changed or broadened |
| **126028** | 8 | Application access changed |
| **126029 / 126030** | 6 / 7 | Project role membership / generic permission changed |"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: [Jira Audit] Rule Reference (2/2)
attributes.visState:
{"title": "[Jira Audit] Rule Reference (2/2)", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "###  
Category tiers backstop the long tail; correlation rules escalate repeated behavior by the same actor.

| Rule | Level | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| **126031 / 126032** | 10 | Repeated permission / public-access changes (corr) |
| **126040 / 126041** | 10 / 6 | App/webhook/OAuth trust added / removed |
| **126042 / 126043** | 10 / 5 | API token created / revoked |
| **126045 / 126046** | 6 / 5 | Group membership / user lifecycle |
| **126050-126056** | 5-7 | Workflow, schemes, boards, projects, dark features, mail |
| **126053** | 10 | Project deleted or archived |
| **126060 / 126061 / 126062** | **11** / 7 / 5 | Audit log config changed / exported / viewed |
| **126070 / 126071** | **12** / 8 | Full data export or backup / Assets export |
| **126072 / 126073** | 8 / 6 | Restore or import / issue export |
| **126074** | **12** | Bulk export by one actor (corr, ≥5 in 10 min) |
| **126090 / 126091** | 6 / 5 | Category fallback tiers (security / admin) |"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: [Jira Audit] Coverage Notes
attributes.visState:
{"title": "[Jira Audit] Coverage Notes", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "**Notes:**
- Correlation `frequency="N"` fires on the (N+2)th event; `ignore` suppresses per-rule, not per-actor (anti-storm trade-off).
- `jira_author_key` is emitted on Data Center; Cloud events may only carry `jira_author_account_id` — swap `same_field` in `126-jira_rules.xml` if needed.
- Source IP panels populate only when audit records carry an address (mostly login events)."}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Jira Audit Events
attributes.description: Jira audit-log monitoring (data.jira_integration:jira): volume, category and severity trends, top actors/summaries, security detections (admin grants, MFA-disable, public exposure, app trust, API tokens), authentication and brute-force correlations, permission changes, export/backup collection, audit-log integrity, user/group lifecycle, fallback canary, and a rule/coverage reference. Ruleset 126000-126099.
